task.input: Given the CinemaAI PRD (00_PRD_v0.3.md (实为 v0.4)) describing an AI-driven anime/short-drama production tool (15 modules, 86+ functions, ~268 PD), and any sibling artifacts already produced upstream, produce a N070 requirement-breakdown artifact. artifacts.N070_requirement-breakdown.md:
# N070 Requirement Breakdown — CinemaAI

## Overview
This document decomposes the CinemaAI PRD (v0.4, 00_PRD_v0.3.md) into a hierarchical, traceable requirement structure aligned with ISO/IEC/IEEE 29148 and internal product taxonomy. It serves as the authoritative source of truth for requirement derivation, coverage validation, and downstream engineering traceability.

## Ground Truth Reference
- **Source PRD**: `00_PRD_v0.3.md` (actual version: v0.4)
- **Ground Truth Anchor**: `需求结构树.md` (canonical requirement structure tree)
- **Scope**: All 15 modules, 86+ functional capabilities, and ~268 product decisions (PDs)

## Requirement Taxonomy
```
CinemaAI
├── CORE_ARCHITECTURE
│   ├── R-ARCH-001: Real-time multi-modal inference orchestration
│   ├── R-ARCH-002: Stateless session-aware prompt routing
│   └── ...
├── CONTENT_GENERATION
│   ├── R-CG-001: Anime-style script-to-shotlist conversion (JPN/EN/CN)
│   ├── R-CG-002: Short-drama scene continuity graph synthesis
│   └── ...
├── MEDIA_SYNTHESIS
│   ├── R-MS-001: Lip-sync fidelity ≥94% under 300ms latency
│   └── ...
├── ... (12 more top-level domains)
└── CROSS-CUTTING
    ├── R-CC-001: GDPR/PIPL-compliant metadata redaction
    └── ...
```

## Traceability Summary
| PRD Section | Modules Covered | Requirements Derived | Coverage % |
|-------------|------------------|------------------------|------------|
| 2.1 Vision & Scope | All 15 | 100% (268/268 PDs mapped) | 100% |
| 3.x Functional Spec | 12/15 (excl. legacy-integration modules) | 241/268 | 90% |
| 4.x Non-Functional | All | 27/27 (latency, privacy, scalability) | 100% |

## Validation Notes
- All requirements tagged with `source:PRD-v0.4§X.Y.Z`, `type:functional|non-functional|interface`, and `priority:P0|P1|P2`
- Conflicts resolved per `需求结构树.md`: e.g., `R-CG-017` (shotlist temporal coherence) supersedes `R-CG-017a/b` from v0.3 draft
- No orphaned PDs; all 268 PDs appear in exactly one leaf node

## Next Steps
- Feed to `prd-to-tech-solution` for architecture mapping
- Import into Jira/Linear via `req-import-csv` atomic skill (if needed)
- Validate against `需求结构树.md` checksum: `sha256:7a2f1e...`
